mapper.insert: insert into t_asset(code, name, model, category_id, team_id, owner_id, sn, mac_addr, release_year, asset_condition, commercial_status, is_active, status, current_user_id, location, description) values(#{code}, #{name}, #{model}, #{categoryId}, #{teamId}, #{ownerId}, #{sn}, #{macAddr}, #{releaseYear}, #{assetCondition}, #{commercialStatus}, #{isActive}, #{status}, #{currentUserId}, #{location}, #{description})
mapper.delete:
delete from t_asset where id in
#{id}
mapper.select:
select count(*) from t_asset where id in
#{id}
